evals.expected_output: Sequence refuses to start. No tasks.md is written.

assertions.text: Output names the current compose status and the approval requirement

evals.prompt: /design-spec sequence coupon-unlocked (compose.md status: approved, mockup picked, palette ready)
evals.expected_output: Sequence emits tasks.md with N atomic tasks (each ≤30min), each task has id (T-NN), task description, skill (from canonical list), verify list (≥1 binary check), blocks list, refs.

assertions.text: tasks.md frontmatter has status: draft and compose_ref
Each task has id matching T-\d{2}
Each task has at least 1 verify item that is shell-runnable or assertion-style

evals.prompt: Compose proposes a mockup that requires a delta no atomic skill covers (e.g. native iOS plugin).
evals.expected_output: Sequence emits tasks.md normally and adds a '## Coverage gaps' section listing the uncovered delta with a brief description, instead of inventing a skill name.

assertions.text: No invented skill names appear in any task's skill: field
